scripts.test:ui: cross-env ENV_ID=dev npx playwright test tests/saucedemo --project=chromium
scripts.test:api: cross-env ENV_ID=qa npx playwright test tests/booking --project=chromium
scripts.test:heroku: cross-env ENV_ID=qa npx playwright test tests/herokuapp --project=chromium
scripts.test:all: npm run test:ui && npm run test:api && npm run test:heroku
